name: Azure Data Factory
description: Import Azure Data Factory pipelines and triggers as Dagster assets. Uses StateBackedComponent to cache the pipeline list at prepare time so code-server reloads are fast.
author: Dagster Community

outputs.description: Generates one asset per ADF pipeline and/or trigger

tenant_id.label: Tenant ID
tenant_id.description: Azure AD tenant ID (optional — uses DefaultAzureCredential if absent)

filter_by_name_pattern.label: Filter by Name Pattern
filter_by_name_pattern.description: Regex pattern to include only matching entities

exclude_name_pattern.label: Exclude Name Pattern
exclude_name_pattern.description: Regex pattern to exclude matching entities

filter_by_tags.label: Filter by Tags
filter_by_tags.description: Comma-separated tag keys that entities must possess

generate_sensor.label: Generate Observation Sensor
generate_sensor.description: Create a sensor to observe external pipeline runs and trigger runs

poll_interval_seconds.label: Sensor Poll Interval (s)
poll_interval_seconds.description: How often the observation sensor checks for new runs

group_name.label: Asset Group
group_name.description: Dagster asset group name for all imported assets

description.label: Description
description.description: Optional description for the Azure Data Factory component

defs_state.label: Defs State Config
defs_state.description: StateBackedComponent cache configuration. Defaults to local filesystem cache. Set to a custom path or remote backend if needed.

path.description: Directory path for the local filesystem cache
